mechanism_narrative: Near-zero federal funds rate reduces discount rates for equity valuations, driving positive forward returns as liquidity injections offset fundamental weakness.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 55% of observations when FEDFUNDS is below 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 7.0%, equity markets price in prolonged recessionary drag, generating negative forward returns over a quarter as corporate earnings forecasts are downgraded.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE stabilizes below 8.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in retail sales and housing starts signals collapsing consumer demand, which overwhelms monetary support and drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint decline in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict negative returns when FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%, or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: During liquidity crises, sharp month-over-month drops in industrial production trigger short-term panic selling, but markets quickly rebound as central bank backstops activate, yielding positive 5-day forward returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain negative in more than 50% of triggered instances, or the rebound effect disappears when FEDFUNDS is not at the zero lower bound.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation remains elevated while the federal funds rate is near zero, markets anticipate future rate hikes and stagflation risks, producing negative forward returns as real yields turn negative.
failure_condition: Positive returns dominate when CPIAUCSL exceeds 210 with low rates, or the interaction effect vanishes in periods of falling inflation expectations.

mechanism_narrative: Declining total nonfarm payrolls directly reduces aggregate income and corporate revenue expectations, creating a persistent negative drift in equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The correlation between PAYEMS changes and 60-day forward returns is positive or statistically indistinguishable from zero over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When real GDP growth turns negative, equity markets price in recessionary earnings cuts, but the signal is strongest when the contraction exceeds 1.0% quarter-over-quarter, driving negative 20-day returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered observations, or the threshold effect disappears when monetary policy is aggressively easing.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where industrial production falls while the unemployment rate rises indicates a broad-based economic slowdown, leading to negative forward returns over a quarter as earnings revisions turn negative.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when fiscal stimulus is announced, or the interaction term shows no incremental predictive power over single-series models.
